title: geonoma pohliana subsp. pohliana
intro: Geonoma pohliana subsp. pohliana is a subspecies of palm tree, specifically a species of climbing palm in the family Arecaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues, including diarrhea and dysentery. The health benefits of Geonoma pohliana subsp. pohliana include anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health ailments in traditional medicine.
